languages.text: Eogunn selects a primary target and 3 additional cells within a 5-cell radius around it. He unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the primary target. Then, lightning bolts from the primary target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets and all creatures in their path. The primary target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creatures is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn selects a primary target and 3 additional cells within a 5-cell radius around it. traits.locale_text:
Chains up to 4 cells within {uip|AbilityRange|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} cells of each other, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}% armour penetration to each target in these cells.
All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks on him are removed. Each subsequent target in a chain suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage, but the damage dealt to the same creature is also reduced by −30%.

Eogunn selects the main target and 3 additional targets within a 5-cell radius around it. He unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}% armour penetration to the main target. Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets and all creatures in their path. The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets.
Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target.
Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets
.
The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%.
<i>All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

Chains up to 4 times, each within {uip|AbilityRange|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} cells of each other, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}% armour penetration to each target.
All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks on Eogunn are removed. Each subsequent target in a chain suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage, but damage dealt to the same target is reduced by −50%.

languages.text: Эоганн выбирает основную цель и 3 клетки в радиусе 5 клеток от нее. Все существа, находящиеся на этих клетках или на клетках между ними и основной целью становятся дополнительными целями. Эоганн выпускает энергетический разряд, который наносит {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} электрического урона с {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} пробитием брони основной цели. Затем летящие от основной цели молнии наносят столько же урона дополнительным целям. Помимо этого, основная цель получает на +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} больше урона, а для дополнительных это значение уменьшено наполовину. Урон, наносимый одному и тому же существу, уменьшен на −50%. Все уровни {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} снимаются с Эоганна.
languages.original_text: Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets. Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target. Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets . The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

languages.text:
Eogunn selecciona el objetivo principal y 3 casillas en un radio de 5 casillas a su alrededor. Todas las criaturas de esas casillas y las casillas que haya entre ellas y el objetivo principal se convierten en objetivos adicionales.
Eogunn despide un rayo de energía que inflige {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} de daño de conmoción con un {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} de penetración de armadura al objetivo principal.
Después, del objetivo principal surgen rayos que infligen ese mismo daño a los objetivos adicionales
.
El objetivo principal sufre +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} de daño adicional. Los objetivos adicionales sufren la mitad de este daño. El daño infligido a objetivos repetidos se reduce en un −50 %.
<i>Eogunn pierde todas las acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets.
Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target.
Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets
.
The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%.
<i>All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

Eogunn selecciona el objetivo principal y 3 casillas en un radio de 5 casillas a su alrededor. Todas las criaturas de esas casillas y las casillas que haya entre ellas y el objetivo principal se convierten en objetivos adicionales.
Eogunn despide un rayo de energía que inflige {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} de daño de conmoción con un {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} de penetración de armadura al objetivo principal.

.

<i>Eogunn pierde todas las acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.

languages.text:
Eogunn wählt das Hauptziel und 3 Felder in einem Radius von a 5 Feldern aus. Alle Kreaturen auf diesen Feldern und den Feldern zwischen ihnen und dem Hauptziel werden zusätzliche Ziele.
Eogunn feuert einen Energiebolzen ab, der dem Hauptziel {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} Schockschaden mit {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} Rüstungsdurchdringung zufügt.
Anschließend fügen Blitze des Hauptziels den zusätzlichen Zielen denselben Schaden zu.
Das Hauptziel erleidet +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} mehr Schaden. Zusätzliche Ziele erleiden die Hälfte dieses Schadens. Derselben Kreatur zugefügter Schaden wird um −50 % reduziert.
<i>Alle {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel werden von Eogunn entfernt.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets.
Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target.
Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets
.

Eogunn feuert einen Energiebolzen ab, der dem Hauptziel {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} Schockschaden mit {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} Rüstungsdurchdringung zufügt.

languages.text:
Eogunn sélectionne la cible principale et 3 cases dans un rayon de 5 cases. Toutes les créatures sur ces cases et sur les cases entre la cible principale et elles-mêmes deviennent des cibles additionnelles.
Eogunn lance un trait d'énergie qui inflige {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} points de dégâts d'électrocution avec {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} points de pénétration d'armure à la cible principale.
Les éclairs de la cible principale infligent ensuite la même quantité de dégâts aux autres cibles.
La cible principale subit +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} points de dégâts en plus. Les cibles supplémentaires en subissent la moitié. Les dégâts infligés à la même créature sont réduits de −50 %.
<i>Eogunn perd tous ses cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets.
Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target.
Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets
.
The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%.

Eogunn lance un trait d'énergie qui inflige {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} points de dégâts d'électrocution avec {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} points de pénétration d'armure à la cible principale.

languages.text: Eogunn, ana hedefi ve onun etrafındaki 5 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan 3 hücreyi seçer. Bu hücreler ile bu hücrelerle ana hedef arasındaki hücrelerde duran tüm yaratıklar, ilave hedef hâline gelir. Eogunn, bir enerji yıldırımı fırlatarak ana hedefe %{uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} zırh delme değerine sahip {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} şok hasarı verir. Ardından ana hedeften çıkan yıldırımlar, aynı miktarda hasarı ilave hedeflere verir. Ana hedef, +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} ek hasara maruz kalır. İlave hedefler, bu miktarın yarısına maruz kalır. Aynı yaratığa verilen hasar, %50 azalır. Eogunn'un üzerindeki tüm {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimleri ortadan kalkar.

Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target.

languages.text: 伊奥贡选择一个主目标，以及主目标周围5格范围内的3个格子。这些格子内的生物，以及它们与主目标之间路径上的所有生物，都成为额外目标。 伊奥贡释放一枚能量弹，对主目标造成附带{uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}%护甲穿透的{uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}点电击伤害。 随后，从主目标发出的闪电弹对所有额外目标造成等量伤害。 主目标额外受到{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1}点伤害，额外目标受到此伤害的一半。对同一生物造成的后续伤害降低50%。 消耗伊奥贡所有{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数。

The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%.
<i>All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡选择一个主目标，以及主目标周围5格范围内的3个格子。这些格子内的生物，以及它们与主目标之间路径上的所有生物，都成为额外目标。 伊奥贡释放一枚能量弹，对主目标造成附带{uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}%护甲穿透的{uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}点电击伤害。 随后，从主目标发出的闪电弹对所有额外目标造成等量伤害。 主目标额外受到{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1}点伤害，额外目标受到此伤害的一半。对同一生物造成的后续伤害降低50%。 消耗伊奥贡所有{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数。

languages.text:
エオガンは主目標と、それを中心とした半径5マス以内の3マスを選択する。それらのマス内、および主目標とそれらのマスの間にあるマス内のすべてのクリーチャーが追加目標となる。
エオガンはエネルギーボルトを放ち、主目標に{uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}のショックダメージを{uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8}の装甲貫通で与える。
その後、主目標から放たれる稲妻が、追加目標に同量のダメージを与える
。
主目標は+{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1}多くダメージを受ける。追加目標はこの量の半分を受ける。同一のクリーチャーに与えるダメージは−50%減少する。
<i>エオガンのすべての{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}スタックが除去される。
languages.original_text: Eogunn selects the main target and 3 cells within a 5-cell radius around it. All creatures in those cells and in the cells between them and the main target become additional targets. Eogunn unleashes an energy bolt, dealing {uip|DamageAmount|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPen|544287d567d447138284d1baf73fa6b8} armour penetration to the main target. Then, lightning bolts from the main target deal the same amount of damage to the additional targets . The main target suffers +{uip|DamageIncrease|b0f26c799e1d461b855f619a2c1cb1a1} more damage. Additional targets suffer half of this amount. Damage dealt to the same creature is reduced by −50%. All {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed from Eogunn.

その後、主目標から放たれる稲妻が、追加目標に同量のダメージを与える
。

<i>エオガンのすべての{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}スタックが除去される。
